Complex Karte Format Fixture

Overview

This section combines nested Markdown, selected CSV columns, and inline TeX.

resourcecount

csv2
tex2
webp1

Energy formula: E = mc^2

Results

The selected columns must keep their requested order and escape HTML-like data.

statusmetricvalue
stableaccuracy0.98
<fast>, repeatablelatency_ms42

Findings

The weighted sum is imported as a display formula.

\sum_{i=1}^{n} w_i x_i

Diagram

Conclusion

The same CSV resource can be projected again from a different nesting depth.
